title: Eldritch Awakening
description: A mod filled with overpowered loot and eldritch nightmares
body: Embark on a journey into the unknown with a mod that transforms your world, introducing eldritch horrors lurking in the shadows, mysterious new dimensions waiting to be explored, and powerful entities that will test your strength. Venture into the Eclipsed Dimension, a realm shrouded in darkness and secrets, where the mighty Malachar, the Fallen Seraph, awaits those brave enough to challenge him. Discover exotic new woods such as the mystical Lilium Arbor and the shadowy Umbral Oak, perfect for crafting and building. Traverse diverse, uncharted biomes teeming with hidden lore, while maintaining your sanity and managing your need for rest as the horrors take their toll. Beware the enigmatic Lumenwing and other lurking creatures, for not everything in the dark is what it seems. And with even more content on the horizon, prepare to uncover the true depths of this ever-expanding eldritch adventure! - please note that command blocks must be enabled for the full experiance
